description: People Data Labs is a B2B data provider that offers datasets and APIs for people, company, IP, and job posting information. Customers use it to enrich records, search structured workforce data, and access bulk data delivery options.
summary: People Data Labs exposes a single authenticated REST API at `https://api.peopledatalabs.com/v5` for person, company, IP, job posting, autocomplete, cleaner, and related data operations; no public GraphQL, MCP, or first-party CLI surface was found.
